name: French Stuffed Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Parboil the onions for 10 minutes.
2. Scoop out the centers of the onions.
3. Sauté the onion centers, veal, and bacon in a pan until cooked through.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (except butter and bouillon) to the pan and mix well.
5. Stuff the onions with the mixture, dotting them with butter.
6. Place the stuffed onions in a shallow baking dish.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 45 minutes.
